title: Citrus Dutch Stroop Bowl
description: This citrusy, silky dish is a crowd-pleaser and perfectly suited for a lazy Sunday brunch or as a vibrant addition to any meal.
instructions: Prepare the Dutch Stroop by heating it with a pinch of sugar until melted and smooth.
In a large bowl, mix together the Dutch Stroop and lemon zest. Stir well to combine thoroughly.
Roast the sweet potatoes at 425°F (218°C) for about 30 minutes or until tender.
Quarter the mandarin oranges and extract juice along with their zests. Discard any seeds before proceeding.
Add the mandarin orange juice, zest, and remaining sugar to the Dutch Stroop bowl and stir again until well combined.
Divide the roasted sweet potatoes among serving bowls or plates. Spoon the mixed citrusy Dutch Stroop over the top of each portion.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves and pomegranate seeds before serving.
